items.title: (Update) Chase Sapphire & Freedom Cards Get 10x With Paze Checkout through 2026 (United, Shoprite, Dunkin, Etc.)
items.title_en: (Update) Chase Sapphire & Freedom Cards Get 10x With Paze Checkout through 2026 (United, Shoprite, Dunkin, Etc.)
items.title_zh: (更新) Chase Sapphire 與 Freedom 卡在 Paze Checkout 上至2026年可獲得10倍積分（涵蓋 United、Shoprite、Dunkin 等商家）
items.summary_zh: 持卡人在2026年底前於參與的Paze Checkout商戶消費，可獲得10倍積分。
items.title_es: (Update) Chase Sapphire & Freedom Cards Get 10x With Paze Checkout through 2026 (United, Shoprite, Dunkin, Etc.)
